summary: Completed testing of new Admin Declarations View features (iteration 24). All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. Admin can now view declarations organized by client, see declaration details with 4 tabs, send messages in conversation, and request documentation/clarifications.
critical_code_review_comments: All new endpoints properly implemented with correct authentication (require_commercialista for admin-only endpoints)
ClientDeclarationSummary model correctly aggregates declaration stats per client
Message system properly tracks read status for both admin and client
Integration request system sends email notifications to clients
Frontend components properly use data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing client FRANCESCO JUNIOR DE LISO with 1 tax return in bozza status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Declarations View fully functional. Features tested: 1) GET /api/declarations/clients-with-declarations returns list of clients with declaration summaries, 2) POST /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id}/messages sends messages to conversation, 3) PUT /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id}/messages/mark-read marks messages as read, 4) Frontend shows clients list with stats, client detail with declarations, declaration detail with 4 tabs (Panoramica, Dati Inseriti, Documenti, Comunicazioni), 5) Conversation system working with message display and send functionality, 6) Integration request dialog working with section selector, message field, and document list.

backend_api.clients_with_declarations: GET /api/declarations/clients-with-declarations - Working (returns client summaries with declaration counts)
backend_api.tax_return_detail: GET /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id} - Working (returns full declaration with conversazione)
backend_api.create_integration_request: POST /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id}/integration-requests - Working (creates request and sends email)

frontend_ui.admin_declarations_clients_view: Working - Shows stats cards (Clienti, Dichiarazioni, Richieste Pendenti, Messaggi Non Letti) and client list
frontend_ui.client_selection: Working - Clicking client row shows their declarations
frontend_ui.client_declarations_list: Working - Shows declaration cards with status badges and indicators
frontend_ui.declaration_detail_view: Working - Shows header with status, 4 tabs, and full declaration info
frontend_ui.panoramica_tab: Working - Shows Informazioni Pratica, Autorizzazione, Sezioni Compilate, Richieste Pendenti
frontend_ui.dati_inseriti_tab: Working - Shows all 12 sections with data
frontend_ui.comunicazioni_tab: Working - Shows conversation with messages and send input
frontend_ui.message_sending: Working - Can type and send messages in conversation
frontend_ui.richiedi_documentazione_button: Working - Opens dialog with Sezione, Messaggio, Documenti Richiesti fields
frontend_ui.status_change_dropdown: Working - Admin can change declaration status

messages: Test message from admin for testing purposes

integration_requests.mensaje: Test integration request from pytest - please provide additional documents
